title: Ombrelis
description: An improved version of minecraft. It's vanilla-friendly, and there's plenty more to come!
body:
![Ombrelis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70cb430513997cddc0026408c87903e4596f8afb_0.webp)

This modpack offers a revitalized Minecraft experience while preserving the game's original spirit. It includes numerous quality-of-life enhancements, saving you from spending countless hours repeating tasks you've done many times before.

## Play on a server

A custom modpack has been created specifically for the server. Although it is unlisted, you can access it using this link:
[Link to server modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ombrelis-server)
